Home/Conservation
Environmental Action

Protecting Our Natural Heritage

Volcano Arts Center links tourism, community livelihoods, and environmental preservation around Volcanoes National Park. This page turns that mission into a working contribution flow.

Reforestation Drive

Restoring habitats with indigenous tree planting and buffer-zone stewardship.

85,000 / 100,000 Trees Planted

Community Education

Training youth, guides, and local partners in long-term conservation practice.

12 / 20 Communities Reached

Sustainable Art Practice

Supporting low-waste making, recycled material use, and responsible sourcing.

Core Practice Adopted

Invest in the Future of Rwanda's Ecosystem

This flow now records real donation requests, connects them to your profile when signed in, and supports either a safe pay-later test path or configured payment providers.

  • ✓ Direct impact: contributions are logged against purpose, amount, and optional campaign.
  • ✓ Operational visibility: donations appear in the donor dashboard and admin donation board.
  • ✓ Testing-safe: you can choose Confirm Payment Later to avoid depending on live payment setup.
Recommended for testing: use a real name and email, choose a purpose, and leave payment on Confirm Payment Later. That records the donation request without requiring Stripe or mobile money credentials.

Make a Contribution

Choose an amount, select where it should help most, and submit a real donation record.
